summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ComprehendCAT MVP. Backend APIs mostly functional (15/18 passed), frontend UI components working well, but CRITICAL AI budget issue blocks core functionality.

critical_bugs.issue: Emergent LLM key budget exceeded - Current cost: $0.0268625, Max budget: $0.001
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks all core AI functionality - article generation, assessment rounds, vocabulary meanings

timeout_issues.issue: Times out after 30 seconds due to budget exceeded error
timeout_issues.workaround: Increase budget limit or extend timeout handling

timeout_issues.issue: Times out after 30 seconds due to budget exceeded error
timeout_issues.workaround: Increase budget limit or extend timeout handling

ui_bugs.issue: Flashcard mode toggle not visible when no bookmarked words exist

integration_issues.issue: UI shows loading state but fails due to backend budget error

passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero, features, how-it-works sections
Theme toggle works on landing page and header
Google Auth login redirects to auth.emergentagent.com
Auth-gated pages redirect to landing when not authenticated
Backend config APIs work (genres, tones, structures, difficulties, word-limits)
Dashboard loads with assessment CTA, stats cards, quick actions
Assessment page shows genre selection with 3 dropdowns
Reading page shows settings panel with all 5 controls
Vocabulary page shows empty state correctly
Dashboard stats and settings endpoints work
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Emergent LLM key budget exceeded ($0.0268625 vs $0.001 limit). All AI features non-functional. Need to either: 1) Increase budget limit, 2) Get new API key, or 3) Implement proper error handling for budget exceeded scenarios. This blocks core app functionality.

success_percentage.backend: 83% (15/18 tests passed - 3 AI endpoints fail due to budget)
success_percentage.frontend: 95% (All major UI components work, minor flashcard toggle issue)
